theme_notes: The World Cup opens in six days at the Azteca (48 teams, Iran players surrendering passports to the US embassy for visas), the Senate passed a $70B immigration enforcement bill at 3am, Ukraine hit St. Petersburg during Putin's live economic forum, Kim Jong Un toured a new nuclear fuel plant, and the Supreme Court clipped Trump's tariff powers while a US-China deal holds at 30%.
settled: Balanced like the US-China deal — technically, and only for 60 days.
Dead even. More stable than anything involving Tehran right now.
